code:
import io
import string

let input = io.read_to_end()
let n = string.len(input)
mut a = 0
mut b = 0
mut which = 0
mut sign = 1
mut have = false
mut cur = 0
mut i = 0
while i <= n
  mut c = -1
  if i < n
    match string.byte_at(input, i)
    when Some(x)
      c = x
    when None
      c = -1
    end
  else
    c = 32
  end
  let is_ws = c == 32 or c == 9 or c == 10 or c == 13 or i == n
  if is_ws
    if have
      let v = sign * cur
      if which == 0
        a = v
      else
        b = v
      end
      which = which + 1
      have = false
      cur = 0
      sign = 1
    end
  else if c == 45
    sign = -1
  else if c == 43
    sign = 1
  else if c >= 48 and c <= 57
    cur = cur * 10 + (c - 48)
    have = true
  end
  i = i + 1
end
let r = a * a + b * b
print("r=#{r}")
